commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Hear this word, you cows of Bashan, that are in the mountain of Samaria, who oppress the poor, who crush the needy, who say to their masters, Bring, and let us drink. He means the great ones that lived in plenty and wealth, (Challoner) and without restraint, (Isaias xv. , and Jeremias xlvi. ; Calmet) having no compassion for the poor. (Worthington) The women who had too great an ascendency over their husbands, like Jezabel, may also be meant. (Theodoret; Grotius) In many parts of the East the women affect being fat.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Fat kine: He means the great ones that lived in plenty and wealth.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
